title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang tries Beijing's 'zhajiangmian' on food tour
summary_full: The "douzhi'er," a fermented soybean drink that's slightly sour and gray-green in color, made the Nvidia CEO wince.
summary_public: The "douzhi'er," a fermented soybean drink that's slightly sour and gray-green in color, made the Nvidia CEO wince.
